exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.description: A classic compound chest exercise performed on a flat bench using a barbell.

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Bench Press
exercises.description: Bench press performed on an inclined bench to emphasize the upper chest.

exercises.name: Decline Barbell Bench Press
exercises.description: Bench press on a decline bench to target the lower pectoral muscles.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.description: Flat bench press using dumbbells for a greater range of motion and stabilizer recruitment.

exercises.name: Incline Dumbbell Bench Press
exercises.description: Dumbbell press on an incline bench to target the upper pectoral muscles.

exercises.name: Machine Chest Press
exercises.description: A seated chest press machine that provides a controlled path for chest isolation.

exercises.name: Cable Chest Fly
exercises.description: Using cable pulleys to perform a flying motion, maintaining constant tension on the pecs.

exercises.name: Pec Deck Machine
exercises.description: An isolation exercise for the chest performed on a fly machine.

exercises.name: Push-up
exercises.description: The fundamental bodyweight chest exercise.

exercises.name: Weighted Push-up
exercises.description: Push-ups performed with a weight plate on the back or a weighted vest.

exercises.name: Chest Dips
exercises.description: A compound movement using parallel bars. Lean forward to target the lower chest.

exercises.name: Weighted Dips
exercises.description: Dips performed with a weight belt or holding a dumbbell between the legs.

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.description: A fundamental compound lift pulling weight from the floor to standing.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.description: A deadlift variation focusing on the eccentric phase to target hamstrings and glutes.

exercises.name: Pull Up
exercises.description: A fundamental bodyweight vertical pull using an overhand grip.

exercises.name: Chin-up
exercises.description: Bodyweight vertical pull using an underhand grip, increasing bicep involvement.

exercises.name: Weighted Pull-up
exercises.description: Pull-ups performed with added weight from a belt or dumbbell.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown (Standard)
exercises.description: Conventional cable pulldown for back width.

exercises.name: Wide Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.description: A vertical pulling exercise on a cable machine using a wide bar.

exercises.name: Close Grip Lat Pulldown
exercises.description: Vertical pull with a narrow, neutral grip.

exercises.name: Seated Cable Row
exercises.description: A horizontal pull performed on a cable machine to build back thickness.

exercises.name: Bent Over Barbell Row
exercises.description: A heavy horizontal pull using a barbell for overall back development.

exercises.name: Bent Over Dumbbell Row
exercises.description: Horizontal pull with dumbbells for back thickness.

exercises.name: One-Arm Dumbbell Row
exercises.description: Rowing a dumbbell while supporting yourself with the other hand.

exercises.name: Barbell Standing Press
exercises.description: A fundamental overhead press performed while standing.

exercises.name: Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press
exercises.description: Overhead press using dumbbells while seated for better shoulder isolation.

exercises.name: Arnold Press
exercises.description: A shoulder press variation that starts with palms facing you and rotates as you press up.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.description: An isolation exercise for the lateral deltoid to build shoulder width.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Front Raise
exercises.description: Isolating the front deltoid.

exercises.name: Cable Face Pull
exercises.description: A pull towards the face to target the rear delts and improve posture.

exercises.name: Barbell Shrug
exercises.description: Building the upper traps with a barbell.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Shrug
exercises.description: Building the upper traps with dumbbells.

exercises.name: Barbell Back Squat
exercises.description: The 'King' of leg exercises. A compound movement with a barbell across the upper back.

exercises.name: 45 Degree Leg Press
exercises.description: A compound leg exercise performed on an angled sled machine.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.description: Single-leg squat with the rear foot elevated on a bench.

exercises.name: Seated Leg Extension
exercises.description: Isolation exercise for the quadriceps performed on a machine.

exercises.name: Seated Hamstring Curl
exercises.description: Isolation exercise for the hamstrings performed on a machine.

exercises.name: Standing Calf Raise
exercises.description: Calf exercise performed by rising onto the toes from a standing position.

exercises.name: Machine Hip Adductor
exercises.description: Closing the legs against resistance to target the inner thighs.

exercises.name: Machine Hip Abductor
exercises.description: Opening the legs against resistance to target the outer glutes.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Bicep Curl
exercises.description: Curling a cambered bar to reduce wrist strain while targeting the biceps.

exercises.name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
exercises.description: Bicep isolation using dumbbells.

exercises.name: Alternating Hammer Curl
exercises.description: Curls with a neutral grip (palms facing in) to target the brachialis and forearms.

exercises.name: Concentration Curl
exercises.description: Seated isolation curl to peak the bicep.

exercises.name: Cable Bicep Curl
exercises.description: Constant tension bicep curl using a cable machine.

exercises.name: Machine Bicep Curl
exercises.description: Controlled bicep isolation on a machine.

exercises.name: Tricep Rope Pushdown
exercises.description: Extension exercise on a cable machine using a rope attachment.

exercises.name: Overhead Dumbbell Tricep Extension
exercises.description: Stretching the long head of the triceps overhead.

exercises.name: Close Grip Bench Press
exercises.description: Bench press with a narrow grip to shift the focus from the chest to the triceps.

exercises.name: Plank
exercises.description: Core stability exercise holding a push-up position on forearms.

exercises.name: Wall Sit
exercises.description: Holding a squat position with the back against a wall to build leg endurance.

exercises.name: Burpees
exercises.description: A full-body exercise combining a squat, push-up, and jump for cardiovascular health.

exercises.name: Kettlebell Swing
exercises.description: An explosive hip hinge movement using a kettlebell for power and conditioning.

workouts.name: Horizontal Press Power
workouts.description: A high-volume session from the 2020 split focusing on building the pectoral base.

workouts.name: Back Width & Posterior Chain
workouts.description: Balances heavy deadlifting with high-volume pulling.

workouts.name: Shoulder Cap & V-Taper
workouts.description: Targets all three heads of the deltoid.

workouts.name: Bicep & Tricep Overload
workouts.description: Dedicated arm day utilizing compound movements and isolation.

workouts.name: Upper Body Push/Pull
workouts.description: Pairs heavy horizontal and vertical movements for the chest and back.

workouts.name: Arms, Shoulders & Core
workouts.description: Focuses on the secondary upper body muscles.

workouts.name: The Leg Engine
workouts.description: The quintessential leg workout focusing on heavy squatting and isolation.

workouts.name: Alpha Push (Power)
workouts.description: Session A of the PPL split focuses on heavy flat benching.

workouts.name: Alpha Pull (Width)
workouts.description: Emphasizes vertical pulling and high-tension bicep work.

workouts.name: Alpha Legs (Strength)
workouts.description: A high-intensity, lower-rep session for maximum weight.

workouts.name: Beta Push (Hypertrophy)
workouts.description: Session B shifts focus to the upper chest and accessory tricep work.

workouts.name: Beta Pull (Thickness)
workouts.description: Features the deadlift and rowing variations for mid-back thickness.

workouts.name: Beta Legs (Volume)
workouts.description: Increases rep ranges to prioritize time under tension.

routines.name: The Aesthetic Architect
routines.description: The ultimate 5-day traditional bodybuilding split. Perfect for those wanting to sculpt a classic physique.

routines.name: The High-Performance Minimalist
routines.description: Maximum results in minimum time using antagonist training. Ideal for busy professionals.

routines.name: The Elite Push-Pull-Legs Protocol
routines.description: The gold standard of modern training. Targets every muscle group twice a week.
